title: Locator Border
description: Moves the locator bar to the border of the screen
body:
![Locator Border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f957598f7a77ad945079d2228bd547f603399fc.png)

Locator Border is a client-side mod that moves player waypoints off the locator bar and onto the edges of your screen. Your experience bar stays visible, your HUD stays clean, and you always know where everyone is.

  
--- --- ## ✨ Features ### Clean Off-Screen Tracking Waypoints map smoothly to the perimeter of your display instead of cluttering the space directly above your hotbar. Includes a focus mechanic that gently pulls a targeted waypoint inward and scales it up when you want it to. ### Configuration Tailor the mod to your exact preferences. Swap basic tracking dots for renders of player faces, enable sleek drop shadows or borders, and completely customize the scaling behavior of focused markers. ### Coloring Profiles Make your indicators look exactly how you want. You can set waypoint colors to change automatically based on a player's in-game scoreboard team, assign permanent custom colors to specific friends, or use the default random color assigned to each player. ### Contextual Labels Keep track of critical world metrics seamlessly without cluttering your viewpoint. Toggle clean text overlays that display the waypoint owner's name, your exact distance in blocks, or both simultaneously. ### Miscellaneous Bring quality-of-life features to your screen bounds. Display cardinal directions *(N, S, W, E)* project cleanly along the edges of your screen, shifting accurately based on your camera's direciton.
